calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Entry of Judgment. No appearance by or on behalf of defendant(s)
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brndon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INC. CO.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(s) DANICA DANA PRATT.
Motion for Requet for Admissions granted on August 13, 2014 submitted to the court in lieu of live testimony.
Court ordered defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Damages $15,904.70
Pre-Judgment Interest $1,558.55
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $512.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $17,975.75
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Set For Trial On May-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL INS. CO. Mtn To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance is granted: Plaintiff's requests for admissions, set one are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $460. Prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Before hearing, the court received courtesy copies of the moving papers. Therefore, the Court vactes the tentative ruling and PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL INS. CO.'S Motion To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance is continued to August 13, 2014 at 9:00 am in Department 302. Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Continued To Aug-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL INS. CO.'s Motion To Deem Admissions And Of Non appearance is Continued to August 1, 2014 to give moving party STATE FARM MUTUAL INS. CO. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 24 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has no courtesy copies of the papers. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
